settings.hero_subtext: We exist to close the gap between premium renovation and generic Ra80 lighting.
settings.story_heading: Homeowners spend significant sums on renovation, then light their spaces with Ra80 bulbs.
settings.story_body:
Most never realise the light is the problem. Wood looks flat, skin looks grey, and food looks dull — not because of the renovation, but because of the bulbs.

KAYVA was founded to close that gap. We offer properly specified, properly documented Ra95+ lighting designed for the way Singapore homes actually live.

settings.title: Honest
settings.text: We state real numbers and admit trade-offs. Never overclaim.

settings.title: Precise
settings.text: We care about specifications and get them right. Details matter.

settings.title: Local
settings.text: Proudly Singaporean, with genuine knowledge of local homes and conditions.
